plan_steps.title: Natural language -> optical language

plan_steps.title: Recommend adapter

plan_steps.title: Plan local tool calls

plan_steps.safety_note: No solver is executed by default.

plan_steps.title: Preview artifacts and evidence

plan_steps.safety_note: No production-grade physical validation is claimed.

plan_steps.title: Check permission gates
plan_steps.description: Block solver, LLM, upload, publish, tag, and release actions by default.
